message:
style: apply rustfmt to remaining WASM contract test files

Complete the formatting pass started in 8c0ba992 by reformatting the
six WASM contract test files that were missed in that earlier commit.

Changes are purely whitespace/formatting — no logic changes:

- wasm_abi_handle_lifecycle_contract.rs: Collapse multiline method
  chains and type annotations that fit on fewer lines
- wasm_bundle_size_budget_contract.rs: Realign chained JSON index
  expressions to standard indent levels
- wasm_e2e_log_schema_contract.rs: Collapse short filter_map chains,
  expand long assert_eq! messages, reformat string arrays
- wasm_js_exports_coverage_contract.rs: Expand long assert! messages
  to separate lines, collapse short path/read_to_string chains
- wasm_npm_pack_smoke_contract.rs: Expand arrays and long assert!
  messages, collapse short filter_map/parse chains
- wasm_package_build_contract.rs: Realign assert_eq! args, expand
  long path builder chains

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
